spacing_and_layout.rider_layout: Full-bleed Leaflet map in background. Foreground is a bottom-sheet (Drawer) containing the bento grid of ride options. Drawer has no backdrop blur, solid background.
spacing_and_layout.driver_layout: Control Room Grid. Map on top 50%, Bottom 50% is a dense, high-contrast dashboard with live metrics, online toggle, and incoming request cards.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_radius: Sharp edges. Use rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). No soft rounded-2xl.

motion.hover_states: Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-[2px]) and gain a sharp 4px hard shadow (brutalist shadow) rather than a soft blur.
motion.drawer: Smooth slide up from bottom. Ensure safe-area padding at the bottom.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp borders, high contrast. On hover, invert colors or add a brutalist hard shadow.
components.drawers: Use Shadcn Drawer for ride booking and driver request acceptance. Must be easily swipeable with one hand.
components.inputs: Use Shadcn Input. Style: flat background, 1px border, focus state turns border to primary CTA color with 0px ring.
components.map: Leaflet/OpenStreetMap. Must use a custom tile layer for the map to match the theme (e.g. CartoDB Positron for Light, CartoDB Dark Matter for Dark).
components.icons: lucide-react for all UI icons. Use 2px stroke width.

taxi_backgrounds.description: cars on road between buildings during daytime

driver_portraits.description: a man sitting in the driver's seat

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the frontend as a mobile-first PWA-style React application.
Use Tailwind CSS for styling, adhering strictly to the Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) design rules.
Implement two distinct layouts: Rider App (Light mode, map-centric with Drawers) and Driver App (Dark mode, control-room dashboard).
For the Leaflet map, use 'CartoDB Positron' tiles for the Rider and 'CartoDB Dark Matter' tiles for the Driver. This keeps the design stark and Anti-AI.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Open Sans'. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Include these via Google Fonts.
For all actionable items, ensure there's a data-testid attribute.
OTP Login: Keep it simple and brutalist. A large number input field with high contrast typography.
Vehicle selection: Use 'bento' grid cards. Since car icons failed to generate, use Lucide React icons (Car, CarFront, Truck) as minimalist representations.
Driver dashboard: The 'Go Online' button must be massive and highly visible, using the #DFFF00 accent.
Payment Screen: Stark white (or black) overlay, big typography showing the final fare, and stark buttons for Stripe/Cash.
Rating Screen: Large 5-star Lucide icons, high contrast text.
NEVER use placeholder images; use the provided Unsplash URLs.
Avoid standard Vercel/Stripe looks. Keep radii minimal (0px or 4px), borders sharp, and typography aggressive.
